text:
First, note:  
- US/Mountain is UTC-7 (during standard time; no DST in 1247).  
- Europe/Paris is UTC+0:52 (before 1911, local mean time based on longitude).  

12:00 PM (noon) in US/Mountain = 19:00 UTC (since 12:00 + 7 hours = 19:00 UTC).  

Paris local mean time = UTC + 0h 52m = 19:52.  

Date remains August 8, 1247.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 19:52
